name: Privacy Policy Linter
description: Placeholder per spec-v3.md §52. Full implementation lands in Step 29. Not a contract, but a frequently-paired document. Checks alignment with CCPA § 1798.130 disclosure requirements, GDPR Articles 13/14, COPPA disclosure, state-by-state required content. Includes a 'matches your asserted DPA terms' check when run paired with a DPA.
